opening_thought: Salt. Light. The deck is warm under me and the horizon won't hold still. I fell through the floor and the sea caught me.

thoughts.ship_arrival: No walls here. Only rope and wind and a blue that doesn't lie like the window did.
thoughts.ship_wheel_musings: The wheel turns and nothing answers. We are anchored to something I can't see.
thoughts.mast_musings: Tall as the bedroom was wide. The sail breathes. Somewhere up there, a course was set without me.
thoughts.crate_clue_musings: A word is branded into the green crate: ANCHOR. Burned deep, like it mattered to remember.
thoughts.sea_musings: It goes all the way out. No edges. The first honest distance I've seen since I woke.
thoughts.ship_chest_opened: The lock gives. Inside, the smell of old metal and a quiet that feels like the next door.

ship_arrival.title: On the Deck
ship_arrival.body: I came through the dark and landed on a ship at sea. The bedroom is gone — or it was never the whole map.
ship_arrival.thought: Down was the only way out, so down I went.

crate_clue_found.title: Branded Crate
crate_clue_found.body: A green crate on the deck has a word burned into the wood: ANCHOR.
crate_clue_found.thought: ANCHOR. The chest wants a word, and the deck is whispering one.

ship_chest_opened.title: Chest Unlocked
ship_chest_opened.body: The padlock read ANCHOR. The treasure chest is open. Something waits inside, and a passage beyond it.
ship_chest_opened.thought: One lock down. The sea keeps its secrets in layers, same as I did.

ship_wheel.title: Ship's Wheel
ship_wheel.body: Polished spokes, worn smooth by hands that weren't mine. It spins freely but the ship doesn't turn.

treasure_chest.title: Treasure Chest
treasure_chest.body: Banded in gold, sealed with a lettered padlock. It wants a word, not a number.

crate_clue.title: Stacked Crates
crate_clue.body: Cargo lashed to the rail. The bottom crate has a single word branded into it: ANCHOR.

mast.title: Mast
mast.body: A single great mast carries a striped sail. Rope coils at its foot like a sleeping animal.

ending.title: Adrift
ending.body: The ship holds more than one lock. For now, the deck is yours.
